zh.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley是Roger de Berkeley的女兒，於大約1145年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。她於大約1176年與Robert de Clifford在英國賀福爾克利福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1214年在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福享年70歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特維德莫聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley是Roger de Berkeley的女儿，于大约1145年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。她于大约1176年与Robert de Clifford在英国賀福爾克利福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1214年在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福享年70岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特維德莫聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Letitia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   Laetitia  , which has recently enjoyed a rise in popularity in Britain, notably among West Indians.

en.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley was born about 1145, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England as the daughter of Roger de Berkeley. She married Robert de Clifford about 1176, in Clifford, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1214, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Saint Mary The Virgin Cemetery, Wedmore, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley est née environ 1145, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, fille de Roger de Berkeley. Elle a épousé Robert de Clifford environ 1176, à Clifford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1214, à Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Mary The Virgin Cemetery, Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley wurde um 1145 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, als Tochter von Roger de Berkeley geboren. Sie hat um 1176 in Clifford, Herefordshire, England Robert de Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1214 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Saint Mary The Virgin Cemetery, Wedmore, Somerset, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeleyは約1145年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでRoger de Berkeleyの娘として生まれた。約1176年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクリフォードでRobert de Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1214年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン オン セバーンで70歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトウエドモーサイント マリー ス バージン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.Saint Mary Churchyard, Frampton-On-Sever: 영국 서머세트 베드모어 세인트 메리 테 버긴 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley(은)는 대략 1145년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Roger de Berkeley의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1176년 영국 허퍼드실르 클리퍼드에서 Robert de Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 베드모어 세인트 메리 테 버긴 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra filha de Roger de Berkeley. Ela casou-se com Robert de Clifford aproximadamente 1176, em Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1214, em Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Mary The Virgin Cemetery, Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley родилась около 1145 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. Её отца звали Roger de Berkeley. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Clifford около 1176 г. в местности клиффорд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1214 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт мэри т виргин кеметири, ведмор, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Letitia Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1145, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra como hija de Roger de Berkeley. Se casó con Robert de Clifford aproximadamente 1176, en Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1214, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Mary The Virgin Cemetery, Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra.
